'''鈭歵h-k-p''' ('''thakapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dyslexify|dyslexify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-k-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dyslexify|dyslexify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-k-p
|-
! Lemma
| thakapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thakapithi|thakapithi]] || [[word:thakapiji|thakapiji]] || [[word:thakapishi|thakapishi]] || [[word:thakapi|thakapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thakaputhuth|thakaputhuth]] || [[word:thakapujuj|thakapujuj]] || [[word:thakapushush|thakapushush]] || [[word:thakap|thakap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakaputhu|thakaputhu]] || [[word:thakapuju|thakapuju]] || [[word:thakapushu|thakapushu]] || [[word:thakapu|thakapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakapufuth|thakapufuth]] || [[word:thakapufuj|thakapufuj]] || [[word:thakapufush|thakapufush]] || [[word:thakapuf|thakapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thakapethe|thakapethe]] || [[word:thakapeje|thakapeje]] || [[word:thakapeshe|thakapeshe]] || [[word:thakape|thakape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thakapothoth|thakapothoth]] || [[word:thakapojoj|thakapojoj]] || [[word:thakaposhosh|thakaposhosh]] || [[word:thakap|thakap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakapotho|thakapotho]] || [[word:thakapojo|thakapojo]] || [[word:thakaposho|thakaposho]] || [[word:thakapo|thakapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakapofoth|thakapofoth]] || [[word:thakapofoj|thakapofoj]] || [[word:thakapofosh|thakapofosh]] || [[word:thakapof|thakapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thakap忙th忙|thakap忙th忙]] || [[word:thakap忙j忙|thakap忙j忙]] || [[word:thakap忙sh忙|thakap忙sh忙]] || [[word:thakap忙|thakap忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thakapathath|thakapathath]] || [[word:thakapajaj|thakapajaj]] || [[word:thakapashash|thakapashash]] || [[word:thakap|thakap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakapatha|thakapatha]] || [[word:thakapaja|thakapaja]] || [[word:thakapasha|thakapasha]] || [[word:thakapa|thakapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakapafath|thakapafath]] || [[word:thakapafaj|thakapafaj]] || [[word:thakapafash|thakapafash]] || [[word:thakapaf|thakapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thakapasha|thakapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothakapasha|gothakapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithakapasha|gokithakapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thakapn眉sha|thakapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothakapnkn眉sha|gothakapnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithakapn眉sha|gokithakapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thakapsh毛sha|thakapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothakapnksh毛sha|gothakapnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithakapsh毛sha|gokithakapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thakaprosha|thakaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothakapnkrosha|gothakapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithakaprosha|gokithakaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thakapmusha|thakapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothakapnkmusha|gothakapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithakapmusha|gokithakapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thakapsherasha|thakapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothakapnksherasha|gothakapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithakapsherasha|gokithakapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thakapngasha|thakapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothakapnkngasha|gothakapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithakapngasha|gokithakapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thakapyasha|thakapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothakapnkyasha|gothakapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithakapyasha|gokithakapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thakapyamasha|thakapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothakapnkyamasha|gothakapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithakapyamasha|gokithakapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thakapn眉sh毛sha|thakapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothakapnkn眉sh毛sha|gothakapnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithakapn眉sh毛sha|gokithakapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thakapn眉rosha|thakapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothakapnkn眉rosha|gothakapnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithakapn眉rosha|gokithakapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thakapn眉musha|thakapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothakapnkn眉musha|gothakapnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithakapn眉musha|gokithakapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thakapsh毛n眉sha|thakapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothakapnksh毛n眉sha|gothakapnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithakapsh毛n眉sha|gokithakapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thakapsh毛rosha|thakapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothakapnksh毛rosha|gothakapnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithakapsh毛rosha|gokithakapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thakapsh毛musha|thakapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothakapnksh毛musha|gothakapnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithakapsh毛musha|gokithakapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thakapron眉sha|thakapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothakapnkron眉sha|gothakapnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithakapron眉sha|gokithakapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thakaprosh毛sha|thakaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothakapnkrosh毛sha|gothakapnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithakaprosh毛sha|gokithakaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thakapromusha|thakapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothakapnkromusha|gothakapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithakapromusha|gokithakapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thakapmun眉sha|thakapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothakapnkmun眉sha|gothakapnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithakapmun眉sha|gokithakapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thakapmush毛sha|thakapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothakapnkmush毛sha|gothakapnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithakapmush毛sha|gokithakapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thakapmurosha|thakapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothakapnkmurosha|gothakapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithakapmurosha|gokithakapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thakap|thakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙k忙p|th忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothakap|hothakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙k忙p|hoth忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothakap|hohothakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙k忙p|hohoth忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thakap|n眉thakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙k忙p|n眉th忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thakap|n眉n眉thakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙k忙p|n眉n眉th忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thakap|n茂thakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙k忙p|n茂th忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thakap|n茂n茂thakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙k忙p|n茂n茂th忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthakap|luthakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙k忙p|luth忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthakap|luluthakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙k忙p|luluth忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithakap|lithakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙k忙p|lith忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithakap|lilithakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙k忙p|lilith忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothakap|kothakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙k忙p|koth忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothakap|kokothakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙k忙p|kokoth忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethakap|kethakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙k忙p|keth忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethakap|kekethakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙k忙p|keketh忙k忙p]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
